subject: grammar
title: Word Formation: Adjective to Noun
instruction: Complete the sentences with the noun form of the adjectives in brackets.
passage: Example: The graphs show a significant difference (different) between the ages at which men and women marry.

questions.text: 1. The ___ (strong) of the government's argument for changing the law is that many car accidents happen whilst drivers are speaking on their mobile phones.
2. The ___ (deep) of the lake means that no one has ever seen the bottom.
3. Some parts of the world are not only important in terms of their biodiversity, but they also have a special ___ (beautiful) that must be conserved.
4. This is a good essay in parts, but you need to express yourself with more ___ (clear) at times.
5. The discovery of a new species of monkey in Africa is of great ___ (interesting) to both naturalists and the general public alike.
6. The ___ (difficult) facing the scientists now is how to prove their theory.
7. The results of this research need to be treated with ___ (cautious).
8. The ___ (significant) of the findings surprised even the researchers.
9. Many older people are afraid to go out at night due to the increase in ___ (violent) in our larger cities.
10. The current ___ (controversial) over pensions is likely to continue for some time.
11. We apologise for any ___ (confusing) caused by the last-minute change to the schedule.
